transcript.clean_text: stage 17 of the jittered italia ended in glory for the youngest ever colombian to win a stage of the race santiago bui trago took on the breakaway and won behind it was the pink jersey and jai hindley still not separated by anything more than three seconds lander rose to the podium almeida dropped to fourth nibali was up to fifth overnight though there was bad news for uae emirates joao almeida feeling unwell and testing positive for covert 19 therefore leaving the race so in fourth place and with a good shot of the podium the young portuguese had to leave the children italian that meant that juanpe lopez would be back in the white jersey at the start of stage 18 a day that should have been for the sprinters mark kavadish and the rest hoping to try and battle it out in a fast finish dimar the top printer in the race dainese another stage winner as well as they left borgo valsugana and headed down the valley into the veneto through valdobiadane and prosecco country a climber muradika del podgo one of the emblematic short climbs of the region and a lap and a half around the town of treviso home to many big cycling brands 156 kilometers for the final opportunity for the sprinters at this gila it took around 10 kilometers for the breakaway to form and once it did form it consisted of four really strong riders dressed magnus court as well as eduardo afini and davide gaboro flying the flag for the smaller invited italian teams they were never really given more than two and a bit minutes however a sprinter's not wanting to make a miscalculation there was precedence down the years of that having happened it became clear they were not going to get too much more so the brakes started to play the game discussing tactics making sure they wouldn't go too hard although harry koster did do that and he found a few people in the peloton who were a bit fed up with how he chased things down jacob came to have a word finally everybody was friends again and we headed to the last climb of the day the gap was two and a half minutes on the murdo di cadel poggio the breakaway really starting to exert effort again after having gone easy or relatively easy just about as easy as you can go in a breakaway so had they saved enough energy they were flying by this point and with just under 30 kilometers to go despite the bunches panic and plenty of hands to the pump there was still 140 ahead that dropped to 115 with just under 20 k's to go but it seemed like the gap wasn't moving quickly enough there was movement behind juanpe lopez called out in a split the peloton broken in two and lopez about to slip from eighth to ninth on gc one lap to go one minute and eleven it looked increasingly like the break would have its day when it was still over a minute with just under seven k's to go they panicked they worked but they couldn't bring it back and it was to prove a miscalculation there was further panic and confusion when jai hindley looked to have lost contact with the mallarosa bunch inside the final kilometer however that later proved to be a mechanical and once inside three k's to go he was then given the same time as the malaya but it was all about the stage win at the front they worked together into the last few hundred meters court was the man who had to lead it out on paper the fastest in the group but it was the two strong men who were fighting it out for the win dress de bont on the bike throw getting just about the better of eduardo afini and winning a grand tour stage for the first time behind they were only sprinting for minor places and alberto dainese would win that sprint to the line amelia also coming over the line jai hindi looking relaxed as he crossed with a teammate just a few seconds later but of course mechanical incident and same time given a career-changing moment for driesta bont the name's bont thristerbot and if you didn't know it before you certainly will now the bond finishing ahead of affini and court gaboro the fourth out of that group also contributing to brilliant team tactics as a breakaway bunch and a fantastic execution of the effort disappointment for juanpe lopez who'd lose time but he'd still be in the top 10 at the end of the day and in the white jersey so another day in pink successfully navigated for richard carapaz and this is the gc going into the final three stages three seconds of a lead for the man who won the girl three years ago mikhail lander at 105 on the podium then it's a big gap to nebali who's fourth bilbao now up to fifth the penultimate mountain stage two mountain stages and a time trial remain this on paper not as hard as the one on saturday but you never know what might happen there are still first category climbs there's an excursion into slovenia up kolovrat and then down to cividale del friuli for bonus seconds before a final ascent to the line at the santuario di castelmonte it's stage 19 of the juror a four-star stage and 177 kilometers as always you'll be able to watch live and on demand as the fight for pink continues with three days to go it's gcn plus discovery plus and on the television on eurosport
